metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  def _clean(val: str) -> str:
          """Remove surrounding quotes if present."""
          return val.strip('"').strip("'")
with:
  def _clean(val) -> str:
          """Remove surrounding quotes if present and convert non‑string values."""
          if isinstance(val, (int, float)):
              return str(val)
          # Ensure we are working with a string
          val_str = str(val)
          return val_str.strip('"').strip("'")
Change 2: Replace:
  if p == "cityServed":
              return f"{s} serves the city of {o}"
          if p == "location":
              return f"{s} is located in {o}"
          if p == "country":
              return f"{s} is situated in {o}"
          if p == "isPartOf":
              return f"{s} is part of {o}"
          if p in ("elevationAboveTheSeaLevel", "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres"):
              return f"{s} lies at an elevation of {o} metres above sea level"
          if p == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet":
              return f"{s} lies at an elevation of {o} feet above sea level"
          if p == "operatingOrganisation":
              return f"{s} is operated by {o}"
with:
  if p == "cityServed":
              return f"{s} serves the city of {o}"
          if p == "location":
              return f"{s} is located in {o}"
          if p == "country":
              return f"{s} is situated in {o}"
          if p == "isPartOf":
              return f"{s} is part of {o}"
          if p in ("elevationAboveTheSeaLevel", "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres"):
              return f"{s} lies at an elevation of {o} metres above sea level"
          if p == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet":
              return f"{s} lies at an elevation of {o} feet above sea level"
          if p == "operatingOrganisation":
              return f"{s} is operated by {o}"
          # Additional geographic predicates
          if p == "city":
              return f"{s} is in the city of {o}"
          if p == "administrativeArrondissement":
              return f"{s} lies in the administrative arrondissement of {o}"
          if p == "mayor":
              return f"The mayor of {s} is {o}"
Change 3: '# Codes and identifiers' to '# Codes and identifiers'
Change 4: Replace:
  if p == "leaderParty":
              return f"The leader of {s} belongs to the {o} party"
with:
  if p == "leaderParty":
              return f"The leader of {s} belongs to the {o} party"
